reasoning: The control AC-17 (3) focuses on managing access control points for remote access, which in a Kubernetes context translates to ensuring that network access is controlled and restricted. This involves using NetworkPolicies to deny ingress and egress by default, ensuring services are not exposed unnecessarily via NodePort, and securing ingress traffic with TLS. These measures help manage and restrict remote access to Kubernetes resources, aligning with the control's intent.
title: Remote Access | Managed Access Control Points
